name: WANTED: Seeker of Sinful Spoils
name_jp: “<ruby lang="jp"><rb>罪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>狩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>りの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>悪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>”
desc: Add 1 "Diabellstar" monster from your Deck or GY to your hand. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your "Sinful Spoils" Spells/Traps that is banished or in your GY, except "WANTED: Seeker of Sinful Spoils"; place it on the bottom of the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "WANTED: Seeker of Sinful Spoils" once per turn.
eff: Add 1 "Diabellstar" monster from your Deck or GY to your hand. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your "Sinful Spoils" Spells/Traps that is banished or in your GY, except "WANTED: Seeker of Sinful Spoils"; place it on the bottom of the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "WANTED: Seeker of Sinful Spoils" once per turn.

action: Places the player's banished cards on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
